retrieved_result: Ask The Experts Foundation, Drainage and Water Control "Ask The Experts Foundation, Drainage and Water Control The concrete foundation of our newly built home is cracked in several locations. Our builder says that this is normal and won't cause any problem. I'm not convinced. How can I fix the problem? A certain degree of cracking is normal in concrete
